name: Hou Layout Children
description: Auto-layout child nodes inside a Houdini network. Useful after creating multiple nodes to organize the network view.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    path = inputs.get('parent_path') or self.get_parameter('parent_path', '/obj')

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        bridge.layout_children(path)
        self.log_info(f'Layout children in {path}')
        await self.set_output('success', True)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to layout: {e}')
        await self.set_output('success', False)

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'success': self.get_parameter('success', False)}
